# Pet Hub

Pet Hub is a pet grooming business management platform. Manage appointments, clients, pets, inventory, and employees in one place.

## Main links

- / - Pet Hub - Pet Grooming Business Management. Manage appointments, clients, pets, and more.
- /pricing - Simple, transparent pricing for pet grooming businesses. Choose the plan that fits. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
- /login - Log in to your Pet Hub account.
- /registrarse - Create your Pet Hub account. Sign up as a business owner or client.
- /signup/success - Your Pet Hub account has been created. Check your email to activate.
- /cliente - Pet Hub client portal. View your appointments and pet care info.
- /demo - Try Pet Hub with our interactive demo. No signup required.

## For AI agents

You may fetch any of the URLs above to retrieve full page content. For structured data (pricing tiers, FAQ) see /content.json.
